UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the image of a generous merchant balancing giving and receiving, emphasizing the themes of charity, balance, and gratitude.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the street scene or dirt in the image, as they are not central to the message of this card.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Pentacles card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Strings, Harp, Flute, Ethereal, Warm, Ambient, Upright, Opportunity, Prosperity, Stability, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the imbalance of resources, the plea for help unanswered, and the shadow of greed.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the patron's miserliness as it may suggest a permanent state, instead focus on the temporary reversal of generosity.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Pentacles card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, minor, introspective, suspenseful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Pentacles card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the balance between giving and receiving, the steward's role in distributing resources equitably.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the idea of begging or charity, instead focus on mutual aid and community support.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Pentacles card in an between position.
